channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree down blocking bridleway. No other way pass on a horse., 10th June
item.description:
On the bridleway as you've come through the (boggy) gate and are heading up the wooded hill to cross the Dry Hill private road. The tree is blocking the path so you can't proceed through on horseback. I noticed the issue today mid morning. Not sure how long it's been down. ///betrayed.infringe.spotty is pretty close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greenway Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Half a job done, 10th June
item.description:
Grass cut in parts but not sufficiently along shared path large areas not cut back and neither are the overhanging trees/shrubs. Who ever did half the job needs to complete it. Poor quality workmanship and disappointed that we pay for that. Need to come back and complete the work

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped item, 10th June
item.description:
Large mattress at the high street entrance to Normal Terrace

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Normal Terrace, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole outside No. 6 Brookway Rd, 10th June
item.description:
Pothole outside No. 6 Brookway Rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Brookway Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fence erected over 1.5 m. Causing vison obstruction for traffic/people using deep street , church lane, 10th June
item.description:
In front of and covering the whole of the frontage of 15 Deep Street Prestbury next to the pavement. Currently under construction. Over 1.5 m high timber fence,it does not look temporary. No planning permission.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Deep Street, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Tree branches on verge, 10th June
item.description:
A tree was down and most of it has been removed but several branches have been left behind on the grass verge. What3Words: drawn.talking.snail

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A38, Down Hatherley, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole across the whole road, 10th June
item.description:
There is a depression across the whole road near the speed display warning which feels like a pothole when passing through it and the width of it makes it impossible to avoid. It seems like a road was dug up for some utility and the repair has given up.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shelburne Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole near the junction of Winchester Way, 10th June
item.description:
Two potholes on Warden hill road right after the junction with Winchester Way. This seems to be due to a repair to a previous potholes which has created two new ones. Vehicles turning from Winchester way don't have a clear view of it so really hard to avoid it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 106, Warden Hill Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 12inch by 13inch pothole approximately 2inches deep, 10th June
item.description:
At the end of the driveway at No 26 Springbank Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Springbank Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wide pothole on left side of road as you are going towards the main road (A435), 10th June
item.description:
The hole is placed on the left side stretching 1/4 of the way across the road. As you head up the hill you have to go round which is sometimes dangerous as you can't always see if there is anything coming the other way.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Main Street, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Red 'block' road surface has lifted and left a large hole - hazardous to cyclists, 10th June
item.description:
The red block print road surface as you come off the junction has broken and lifted near the curb (at the edge of the box) as you travel away from the main road in Chosen Way. A large hole has been left which is hazardous to cyclists, particularly in the rain when it's full of water
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chosen Way, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continuous potholes on this area of road, 10th June
item.description:
There is a continuous strip of potholes opening up along the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Main Street, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branches falling and overgrown, 10th June
item.description:
The footpath at the end of Warden Hill Close with the tree overhanging onto private driveways and the road and branches regularly falling off.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4a;4b, Warden Hill Close, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road surface raised above dropped curb, 10th June
item.description:
This is the Entrance/Exit of Waitrose carpark opposite the She'll Garage. The road surface is raised above the dropped curb. Incredibly dangerous and no longer accessible for a wheelchair user or someone with Accessibility needs.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saint James' Roundabout, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Getting worse, 10th June
item.description:
This may have been reported several times before, but the job is never completed properly! The holes are getting deeper and wider, cover The whole width of the road This needs done asap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Road West, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 trees, 10th June
item.description:
Both trees are overgrown and look like they can fall in the next high winds, blocking branch road or can even cause damage to cars or pedestrians. The both needs a trim urgently. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Branch Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped microwve and rubbish bag, 10th June
item.description:
Broken glass in dumped microwave and flytipped bag of builders waste
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Ballinode Close, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown large bush / tree, 10th June
item.description:
Large bush / tree overgrowing the carriage causing motorists to stop and poor visibility of traffic when pulling out of 23 new barn close
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, New Barn Close, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 30 sign knocked down and needs replacing, 10th June
item.description:
Someone has crashed into the 30mph sign outside Talbot Knapp and this needs replacing. Please also consider putting up a speed camera sign, running a community speed check and adding a concealed entrance sign for the five houses on Church Road before the 50mph change. The sign was damaged sometime overnight on Saturday 6 June
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leckhampton Lane, Shurdington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Side of road falling apart, 10th June
item.description:
The side of the road is falling apart. To fit 2 cars by each other, one car has to go into deep potholes on the side of the road and if hit at more than 10mph will significantly damage the car. Issue has been present for more than 6 months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ullenwood Manor Lane, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet
